get.description: Generate a random private key and address. This API has been deprecated, please generate address offline.

post.description: Creates an address from the specified password string (not the private key).This interface has been deprecated, please generate address offline.

value.description: value is the password, converted from ascii to hex. i.e. the pass phrase.

post.description: Validates address, returns either true or false.

address.description: Account address (Format: Base58, Hex, or Base64). Example: `TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs`.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Sign the transaction, it is recommended to sign transactions offline.

transaction.description: Transaction is a contract created by http api

privateKey.description: privateKey is the user private key

post.description: Broadcasts a signed transaction to the network.

RAW_BODY.description:
Transaction object(Singed). See [here](https://developers.tron.network/docs/tron-protocol-transaction) for details.
e.g., {"visible": false, "txID": "6db783c4142b3749a4b598db4644155455c9206e2eca4b31efbd48e46773d9d5", "raw_data": {"contract": [{"parameter": {"value": {"amount": 1000000, "owner_address": "411320a6fb4dcd4ff8e91392a8cb98378633cf7dd8", "to_address": "414c8967080d86f3d0e1352a42f9213c7b9dd03b0f"}, "type_url": "type.googleapis.com/protocol.TransferContract"}, "type": "TransferContract"}], "ref_block_bytes": "f69b", "ref_block_hash": "7d4a3b02495f2320", "expiration": 1762502739000, "timestamp": 1762502681856}, "raw_data_hex": "0a02f69b22087d4a3b02495f232040b888e6eaa5335a67080112630a2d747970652e676f6f676c65617069732e636f6d2f70726f746f636f6c2e5472616e73666572436f6e747261637412320a15411320a6fb4dcd4ff8e91392a8cb98378633cf7dd81215414c8967080d86f3d0e1352a42f9213c7b9dd03b0f18c0843d7080cae2eaa533", "signature": ["2a3743f40d53a124c1597256b155bf286bd8874afe6997ec0a7e63405dea78cd914d9aa9adb8f84dc8d1ef4b1827dd9e8960a40a4ad11e619d06e9601e8b27c000"]}

post.description: Broadcasts a signed, protocol buffer-encoded transaction hex string to the network.

transaction.description:
Transaction object. See [here](https://developers.tron.network/docs/tron-protocol-transaction) for details. (Format: Hex).
e.g., 

post.description: This interface has been deprecated.

passPhrase.description: Password converted from ascii to hex

toAddress.description: Recipient address converted into a hex string

amount.description: Amount of TRX to transfer expressed in SUN.

post.description: This interface has been deprecated.

privateKey.description: passPhrase is the private key in hex string format

toAddress.description: toAddress is the recipient address, converted into a hex string;

amount.description: amount is the amount of TRX to transfer in SUN.

post.description: Creates a TRX transfer transaction. If the recipient account (to_address) does not exist, it will be automatically activated.

owner_address.description:
Sender address. (Format: Base58 or Hex).
e.g., 41FD49EDA0F23FF7EC1D03B52C3A45991C24CD440E

to_address.description:
Recipient address. (Format: Base58 or Hex).
e.g., 4198927FFB9F554DC4A453C64B2E553A02D6DF514B

amount.description:
Amount of TRX to transfer. (Unit: sun).
e.g., 1000

Permission_id.description: The permission ID of the account. Defaults to owner permission if unspecified. Check [More info](https://developers.tron.network/docs/multi-signature).

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

extra_data.description: Remarks or notes for the transaction, in Hex format.

post.description: Activate an account. Uses an already activated account to activate a new account. Users have to generate an account locally with wallet-cli or others SDKs like TronWeb, and then use this API to activate the account generated, or just simply transfer TRX to it.

owner_address.description: Transaction initiator address (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `TUoHaVjx7n5xz8LwPRDckgFrDWhMhuSuJM `

account_address.description: Address of the account to be activated (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `TUZKijZ9Esy8JEkrqMpaVgtbDKKNA5p5CZ`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query information about an account, including TRX balance, TRC-10 balances, stake information and vote information and permissions etc.

address.description: Account address (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `TUoHaVjx7n5xz8LwPRDckgFrDWhMhuSuJM`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Modify account name

owner_address.description: Account address (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `TUoHaVjx7n5xz8LwPRDckgFrDWhMhuSuJM`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Update the account's permission.

owner_address.description: Account address (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `TJZuV6A9QRdtVeJBvewCF9fLF2qnRSEv3y `

actives.description: List of active permissions for the account. Example: `[{ 	"type": 2, 	"permission_name": "active0", 	"threshold": 2, 	"operations": "7fff1fc0037e0000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000", 	"keys": [{ 		"address": "TJZuV6A9QRdtVeJBvewCF9fLF2qnRSEv3y", 		"weight": 1 	}, { 		"address": "TPswDDCAWhJAZGdHPidFg5nEf8TkNToDX1", 		"weight": 1 	}] }]`

owner.description: Owner permission object of the account. Example: `{ 	"type": 0, 	"permission_name": "owner", 	"threshold":1, 	"keys": [{ 		"address": "TJZuV6A9QRdtVeJBvewCF9fLF2qnRSEv3y", 		"weight": 1 	}] }`

witness.description:
Witness permission object (for Super Representatives). Example: `{"type": 1,
"permission_name": "witness",
    "threshold": 1,
    "keys": [{ "address": "TJZuV6A9QRdtVeJBvewCF9fLF2qnRSEv3y",  "weight": 1 }]}`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Get the account balance in a specific block.(Note: At present, the interface data can only be queried through the following official nodes 13.228.119.63 & 18.139.193.235 & 18.141.79.38 & 18.139.248.26)

account_identifier.description: Object containing the account address.  Example: `{   "address": "TLLM21wteSPs4hKjbxgmH1L6poyMjeTbHm" }`

block_identifier.description: Object containing the block number and hash. Example: `{         "hash": "0000000000010c4a732d1e215e87466271e425c86945783c3d3f122bfa5affd9",         "number": 68682     }`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query the resource information of an account(bandwidth,energy,etc)

address.description: The account address (format: Base58 or hex). Example: `TBRmoVhfTYmPS8R9pMosyvZtes4qQsCu3e`

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query bandwidth information.

address.description: The queried account address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: This interface has been deprecated, please use [FreezeBalanceV2](/reference/freezebalancev2-1) to stake TRX to obtain resources.

owner_address.description: Owner address, default hexString

frozen_balance.description: TRX stake amount, the unit is sun

frozen_duration.description: Lock-up duration for this stake, now the value can only be 3 days. It is not allowed to unstake within 3 days after the stake. You can unstake TRX after the 3 lock-up days

receiver_address.description: Optional,the address that will receive the resource, default hexString

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Unstake the TRX staked during Stake1.0, release the obtained bandwidth or energy and TP. This operation will cause automatically cancel all votes.

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

receiver_address.description: Optional, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Returns all resources delegations during stake1.0 phase from an account to another account. The fromAddress can be retrieved from the GetDelegatedResourceAccountIndex API.

fromAddress.description: The queried from account address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

toAddress.description: The queried to account address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query the resource delegation by an account during stake1.0 phase. i.e. list all addresses that have delegated resources to an account.

value.description: The queried account address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: In Stake2.0, stake an amount of TRX to obtain bandwidth or energy, and obtain equivalent TRON Power(TP) according to the staked amount

owner_address.description: Owner address, default hexString

frozen_balance.description: TRX stake amount, the unit is sun

Permission_id.description: Optional. Specifies the permission ID used for multi-signature accounts.

visible.description: Optional. Specifies whether the address is in Base58 format (default: false). Note: Set to true in this example for demonstration purposes.

post.description: Unstake some TRX staked in Stake2.0, release the corresponding amount of bandwidth or energy, and voting rights (TP)

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

unfreeze_balance.description: Amount of TRX to unstake. (Unit: sun)

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Cancel unstakings, all unstaked funds still in the waiting period will be re-staked, all unstaked funds that exceeded the 14-day waiting period will be automatically withdrawn to the owner’s account

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Delegate bandwidth or energy resources to other accounts in Stake2.0.

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

receiver_address.description: Resource receiver address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

balance.description: Amount of TRX to delegate or undelegate for resources. (Unit: sun)

lock.description: Optional. Whether to lock the resource delegation. If `true`, the delegation cannot be canceled during the `lock_period`.

lock_period.description: Lock duration in blocks (1 block ≈ 3 seconds). Only valid if `lock` is `true`. (e.g., 1 day = 28800)

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

post.description: Cancel the delegation of bandwidth or energy resources to other accounts in Stake2.0

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

receiver_address.description: Resource receiver address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

balance.description: Amount of TRX to delegate or undelegate for resources. (Unit: sun)

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

post.description: Withdraw unfrozen balance in Stake2.0,  the user can call this API to get back their funds after executing /wallet/unfreezebalancev2 transaction and waiting N days, N is a network parameter

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

post.description: Remaining times of executing unstake operation in Stake2.0

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query the withdrawable balance at the specified timestamp In Stake2.0

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: In Stake2.0, query the amount of delegatable resources share of the specified resource type for an address, unit is sun.

owner_address.description: Owner address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

type.description: Resource type, 0 is bandwidth, 1 is energy.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: In Stake2.0, query the detail of resource share delegated from fromAddress to toAddress

fromAddress.description: Delegate account address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

toAddress.description: Resource recipient address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: In Stake2.0, query the resource delegation index by an account. Two lists will return, one is the list of addresses the account has delegated its resources(toAddress), and the other is the list of addresses that have delegated resources to the account(fromAddress).

value.description: Account address, in Base58Check format or HEX format.

visible.description: Optional. Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58Check; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query block header information or entire block information according to block height or block hash

id_or_num.description: Block height or hash. If omitted, the latest block is queried. Example: `1000000`.

detail.description: Whether to query the full block information. Set to `true` to query the entire block details; set to `false` to query only the block header. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Returns the Block Object corresponding to the 'Block Height' specified (number of blocks preceding it).
Query block by ID(block hash).

value.description: Block ID (hash). Example: `00000000000f424013e51b18e0782a32fa079ddafdb2f4c343468cf8896dc887`

post.description: Returns a list of block objects.

num.description: Number of most recent blocks to retrieve. Example: `5`

post.description: Returns the list of Block Objects included in the 'Block Height' range specified.
Query the latest block information

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Query the transaction fee, block height by transaction id

value.description: Transaction ID (hash). Example: `bd32eef7469d57011a092c59c745cab1e49c501e9f0ac15c580656f9ead1e319`

get.description: Query the list of nodes connected to the API node
Query Node Information. Returns information about current state of node.
All parameters that the blockchain committee can set

post.description: Get all balance change operations in a block.(Note: At present, the interface data can only be queried through the following official nodes 13.228.119.63 & 18.139.193.235&18.141.79.38 &18.139.248.26)

number.description: Block number. The block hash and block number must be consistent, referring to the same block. Example: `64727388`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

get.description: Query historical energy unit price
Query historical bandwidth unit price
Query the amount of TRX burned due to on-chain transaction fees since [No. 54 Committee Proposal ](https://tronscan.org/#/proposal/54) took effect

post.description: Query the account address list which signed the transaction.

signature.description:
The signature list of transaction. Example: `[ "50a252d1ffd1cf902fe4f7a3986697adf26a37c8193a86ce9ccc76adf5c05d26166c5e90d470a13708c48a76a766d2b2c68ffd733451ff1315040fb526e7ccde1b" ]`. Please note that when testing on this page, please enter the signature string directly into each input field. For example:
`50a252d1ffd1cf902fe4f7a3986697adf26a37c8193a86ce9ccc76adf5c05d26166c5e90d470a13708c48a76a766d2b2c68ffd733451ff1315040fb526e7ccde1b`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format (Default: `false`). For example, when `raw_data` uses its sample value, this parameter should be set to `true`.

post.description: Query the TRC10 token information issued by an account.

address.description: Address is the Token Issuer account address.

visible.description: Optional. Specifies whether the address is in Base58 format (default: false). Note: Set to true in this example for demonstration purposes.

post.description: Query a token by token id. Returns the token object, which contains the token name.

value.description: The ID of the TRC10 token.

post.description: Query a token by name, returns token info.

value.description: TRC 10 token name, default hexString format.

get.description: Query the list of all the TRC10 tokens.

post.description: Query the list of all the TRC10 tokens by a name.

value.description: Name of a TRC 10 token, default hexString.

post.description: Query the list of all the tokens by pagination.Returns a list of Tokens that succeed the Token located at offset.

offset.description: The index of the pagination, default to 0.

limit.description: The amount of tokens per page.

post.description: Transfer TRC10 token.

owner_address.description: Transaction initiator address (Format: Base58 or Hex; Default: Hex). Example: `TZ4UXDV5ZhNW7fb2AMSbgfAEZ7hWsnYS2g`

to_address.description: Recipient address (Format: Base58 or Hex; Default: Hex). Example: `TPswDDCAWhJAZGdHPidFg5nEf8TkNToDX1`

asset_name.description: ID of the TRC-10 token (Format: Base58 or Hex; Default: Hex). Example: `31303030303031`

amount.description: Amount of TRX to transfer. (Unit: sun). Example: `1`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Issues a TRC-10 token. An account can only issue a TRC-10 token once.

owner_address.description: Transaction initiator address (Default: Hex). Example: `TZ4UXDV5ZhNW7fb2AMSbgfAEZ7hWsnYS2g`

total_supply.description: Total supply of the TRC-10 token.

trx_num.description: Defines the price ratio as `trx_num / num`. (Unit of 'trx_num': sun)

num.description: Defines the price ratio as `trx_num / num`. (Unit of 'trx_num': sun)

description.description: Description of the TRC-10 token (Default: Hex). Example: `0x4578616d706c654465736372697074696f6e`

url.description: URL of the official website (Default: Hex). Example: `0x7777772e6578616d706c652e636f6d`

free_asset_net_limit.description: Free Bandwidth limit for TRC-10 token transfers.

public_free_asset_net_limit.description: Total public free Bandwidth limit for a TRC-10 token.

frozen_supply.description: List of frozen supply objects for the TRC-10 token. Example: `{"frozen_amount":1,"frozen_days":2}`

visible.description: (Optional) Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

Permission_id.description: (Optional) Specifies the permission ID used for multi-signature accounts.

owner_address.description: Participant address (Default: Hex). Example: `TZ4UXDV5ZhNW7fb2AMSbgfAEZ7hWsnYS2g`

amount.description: Amount of TRX to participate in token issuance. (Unit: sun)

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Unstake a token that has passed the minimum freeze duration.

owner_address.description: Account address (default: Hex). Example: `TPswDDCAWhJAZGdHPidFg5nEf8TkNToDX1`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Update basic TRC10 token information.

owner_address.description: Token issuer's address (default: Hex). Example: `TPswDDCAWhJAZGdHPidFg5nEf8TkNToDX1`

description.description: Description of the TRC-10 token. (Default: Hex)

url.description: URL of the official website. (Default: Hex)

new_limit.description: New free Bandwidth limit for each caller.

new_public_limit.description: New total free Bandwidth limit for all callers.

post.description: Queries a contract's information from the blockchain, including the bytecode of the contract, ABI, configuration parameters, etc.

value.description:
The contract address. (Format: Base58 or hex).
Example: TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Queries a contract's information from the blockchain. The difference from the `wallet/getcontract` interface is that this interface returns not only the `bytecode` but also the `runtime bytecode` of the contract. Compared with `bytecode`, `runtime bytecode` does not contain constructor and constructor parameter information.

value.description:
Contract address (format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Returns TransactionExtention, which contains the unsigned Transaction

owner_address.description:
Transaction initiator address.(Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TZ4UXDV5ZhNW7fb2AMSbgfAEZ7hWsnYS2g`

contract_address.description:
Contract address. (Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs`

data.description: This field transmits the necessary data for smart contract interaction, including the function being called and its parameters. You may choose to use the `data` field, which contains the complete ABI-encoded information, or use the `function_selector` and `parameter` fields separately. Note that if both `data` and `function_selector` are present, the system will prioritize using the `function_selector` and `parameter` fields for the contract interaction.

fee_limit.description:
Maximum fee (in TRX) allowed for this transaction. (Unit: sun).
Example: `1000000000`

call_value.description: Amount of TRX transferred into the contract. (Unit: sun)

call_token_value.description: Amount of TRC-10 token transferred into the contract.

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Invoke the readonly function (modified by the `view` or `pure` modifier) of a contract for contract data query; or Invoke the non-readonly function of a  contract for predicting whether the transaction can be successfully executed and estimating the energy consumption; or estimate the energy consumption of contract deployment

owner_address.description:
Transaction initiator address.(Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TZ4UXDV5ZhNW7fb2AMSbgfAEZ7hWsnYS2g`

contract_address.description:
Contract address. (Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs`

data.description: This field transmits the necessary data for smart contract interaction, including the function being called and its parameters. You may choose to use the `data` field, which contains the complete ABI-encoded information, or use the `function_selector` and `parameter` fields separately. Note that if both `data` and `function_selector` are present, the system will prioritize using the `function_selector` and `parameter` fields for the contract interaction.

call_value.description: Amount of TRX transferred into the contract. (Unit: sun)

call_token_value.description: Amount of TRC-10 token transferred into the contract.

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

Transaction initiator address.(Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TJmmqjb1DK9TTZbQXzRQ2AuA94z4gKAPFh`

fee_limit.description:
Maximum fee (in TRX) allowed for this transaction. (Unit: sun).
Example: `1000000000`

parameter.description: The parameters passed to the contract's constructor function.(ABI-encoded format)

origin_energy_limit.description: Maximum energy consumption allowed by the contract creator per transaction.

call_value.description: Amount of TRX transferred into the contract at deployment. (Unit: sun)

consume_user_resource_percent.description: Percentage of user Energy consumption for a smart contract. (Range: [0-100])

Transaction initiator address.(Format: Base58 or Hex).

contract_address.description:
Contract address. (Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs`

consume_user_resource_percent.description:
Percentage of user Energy consumption for a smart contract. (Range: [0-100]).
Example: `10`

Permission_id.description: Optional. Permission ID used for multi-signature.

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Update the origin_energy_limit parameter of a smart contract

owner_address.description:
Transaction initiator address.(Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TSNEe5Tf4rnc9zPMNXfaTF5fZfHDDH8oyW`

contract_address.description:
Contract address. (Format: Base58 or Hex).
Example: `TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs`

origin_energy_limit.description:
Maximum energy consumption allowed by the contract creator per transaction.
Example: `100000000`

Creates a trading pair.

owner_address.description: Transaction initiator address (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `4100776428620856AE1D71562812B734E356B68551`

first_token_id.description: ID of the first token in the DEX trading pair. Example: ` 31303030343837`

first_token_balance.description: Balance of the first token in the DEX trading pair. Example: ` 100`

second_token_id.description: ID of the second token in the DEX trading pair. Example: `31303030303031`

second_token_balance.description: Balance of the second token in the DEX trading pair. Example: ` 100`

visible.description: Set to `true` to format addresses in Base58; set to `false` for hex format. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Injects capital into the transaction. The purpose of injecting capital into the trading pair is to prevent price fluctuation from affecting the transaction.

owner_address.description: Transaction creator address (format: Base58 or Hex). Example: `4100776428620856AE1D71562812B734E356B68551`

exchange_id.description: ID of the DEX trading pair. Example: `12`

token_id.description: ID of the token, usually is the token name (format: Hex). Example: `31303030343837`

quant.description: Amount of tokens to inject from a DEX trading pair. Example: `100`

visible.description: Set to `true` to include detailed transaction statistics (`txStat`) in the response. (Default: `false`)

post.description: Withdraws the transaction pair.

exchange_id.description: ID of the DEX trading pair. Example: `12`

token_id.description: ID of the token, usually is the token name (format: Hex). Example: `31303030343837`

quant.description: Amount of tokens to withdraw from a DEX trading pair. Example: `100`

visible.description: Set to `true` to include detailed transaction statistics (`txStat`) in the response. (Default: `false`)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The starting position of the returned results, which must be greater than or equal to 0. For example, when offset is set to `5` and limit is set to `10`, the API returns 10 Super Representatives (SRs) starting from the 6th position in the list sorted by vote count in descending order.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of results to return, which must be greater than 0 and cannot exceed 1000. For example: `10`
